channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Tren de Aragua gang
item.description: President Trump announced Friday that a U.S. strike killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, whom he called the notorious leader of Tren de Aragua.

item.title: COMIC: How excessive heat kills and how to stay safe
item.description: The human body has a natural cooling system, but it has limits in high heat and humidity. Here is the science behind heat-related deaths.

item.title: Gene Shalit, longtime 'Today' show movie critic, dies at 100
item.description: Known for his distinctive appearance and love of puns, Gene Shalit joined Today in 1970 and became arts editor in 1973.

item.title: 'Cool Ladies Club' is directed by 10 working-class women. They live up to the title
item.description: Ten women from a working-class Indian community used smartphones to make a documentary about their unseen lives.
